items.line_en: But that's not true. I'll give you an example

items.line_en: Let's say I'm on a business trip and my work is done early and I want to go home to my family

items.line_en: I check the website. I see that there are there's flights available on the earlier flights. It's called it a day early

items.line_en: And so I call the airline and I say hey, I'm done early. I'd really like to get home to my family

items.line_en: I see that you've got availability in the earlier flight. Can I get on that flight?
